phrases.intent_en: Ask about the ocean museum exhibits
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les expositions du musée de l'océan ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz eks-poh-zee-SYON doo myoo-ZAY doh-syohn
phrases.cultural_note: Cité de l'Océan is an interactive museum dedicated to surfing and ocean sports. It has surfboards, wetsuits, and ocean science exhibits.

responses.english: There are exhibits on oceans and surfing, upstairs.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah day eks-poh-zee-SYON soor layz oh-say-AHN ay luh SURF, ah lay-TAHZH
responses.local: Il y a des expositions sur les océans et le surf, à l'étage.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un simulateur de surf ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL un san-moo-la-TUR duh SURF
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a surf simulator where visitors can practice balance and technique on a moving surface. Popular with beginners.

responses.english: Yes, in the basement. It's included in the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, oh soo-SOL. say ahn-KLOO dahn luh bee-YAY
responses.local: Oui, au sous-sol. C'est inclus dans le billet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is an English audio guide
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un audioguide en anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED ahn ahng-GLEH
phrases.cultural_note: The museum offers audio guides in several languages to accompany the interactive exhibits.

responses.english: Yes, ask at the reception. It's included in the ticket.
responses.phonetic: wee, duh-mahn-DAY ah lah-KUY. say kohm-PREE dahn luh bee-YAY
responses.local: Oui, demandez à l'accueil. C'est compris dans le billet.

phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets are available inside the museum on each floor.

responses.english: On the ground floor, to the right as you enter.
responses.phonetic: oh ray-duh-shoh-SAY, ah DRWAHT ahn ahn-TRAHN
responses.local: Au rez-de-chaussée, à droite en entrant.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about tickets and opening hours
phrases.text_local: Quelles sont les horaires et les tarifs ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son layz oh-RAY ay lay tah-REEF
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is open daily in season, with reduced hours in winter. Family tickets are available.

responses.english: Prices and hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: lay tah-REEF ay layz oh-REHR son ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.local: Les tarifs et horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.
